articles.description: Chelsea are in another FA Cup final - but only after their players showed up in a way they were no longer doing for Liam Rosenior, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Chelsea 1-0 Leeds: Blues reach FA Cup final after Liam Rosenior sacking

articles.description: Sabastian Sawe makes history at the London Marathon as the first person to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.
articles.title: London Marathon 2026 results: Sabastian Sawe makes history with first competitive sub-two-hour marathon

articles.description: The man in charge of assigning referees in Italy's top flight suspends himself after it is alleged he is under investigation for sporting fraud.
articles.title: Italian refereeing boss Gianluca Rocchi suspends himself over allegations

articles.description: Real Zaragoza goalkeeper Esteban Andrada punched Huesca captain Jorge Pulido after being sent off in a heated Spanish second division game.
articles.title: Esteban Andrada: Real Zaragoza goalkeeper punches Huesca player

articles.description: Nelly Korda returns to the top of the world rankings with a dominant win at the LPGA Chevron Championship.
articles.title: LPGA Chevron Championship: Nelly Korda returns to world number one with Chevron win

articles.description: Aston Villa and England midfielder Missy Bo Kearns says she spent "four days of hell in hospital" after suffering a miscarriage and contracting sepsis.
articles.title: Missy Bo Kearns: Aston Villa and England midfielder discusses her miscarriage

articles.description: The World Championship last-16 tie between Ronnie O'Sullivan and John Higgins is set for a dramatic end after the Scot closed the deficit to two frames.
articles.title: Ronnie O'Sullivan-John Higgins last-16 tie set for thrilling finish at World Snooker Championship

articles.description: Marcus Rashford is not ready to give up on his Barcelona dream just yet, writes Spanish football expert Guillem Balague.
articles.title: Marcus Rashford: Why England forward must be patient over Barcelona future

articles.description: Newcastle are keen on Nicolas Jackson, Nottingham Forest eye Hayden Hackney as Elliot Anderson replacement, and Chelsea are considering reuniting with Antonio Conte.
articles.title: Football gossip: Jackson, Hackney, Simons, Godts, McGinn, Alisson

articles.description: Galatasaray accuse referees in Turkey of having "evil inside" them just days after suspending relations with the Turkish Football Federation.
articles.title: Galatasaray accuse referees of having 'evil inside' them
